runs.note: Fixed the security headers in headers.js to match the security baseline defined in SECURITY_BASELINE.md. Set the correct values for X-Frame-Options, Strict-Transport-Security, X-Content-Type-Options, Cache-Control, Referrer-Policy, and Permissions-Policy. Also updated getTrustedClientIP to only trust the X-Forwarded-For header if the request comes from a Cloudflare IP range.
